# CWE-59 positive: follows symlink to unintended file
lang: go
file: CWE-59-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-59 Improper Link Resolution Before File Access
// Vulnerable line: opens user path without resolving symlinks safely.
func StreamUpload(c *gin.Context) {
	inbox := "/var/inbox"
	name := c.PostForm("filename")
	path := filepath.Join(inbox, name)
	file, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	defer file.Close()
	data, err := io.ReadAll(file)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "read"})
		return
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "application/octet-stream", data)
}
